store.title: DRONOVOD
store.summary: Drone gear, FPV kits, field tools and pilot merch.

categories.title: FPV Drones
categories.summary: Ready-to-fly FPV rigs for field tests, training flights, creator shoots, and fast deployment.

categories.title: Cinewhoops
categories.summary: Protected cinematic drones for indoor, city, travel, and low-risk content missions.

categories.title: Batteries & Power
categories.summary: LiPo packs, chargers, field power banks, and battery safety kits.

categories.title: Controllers & Radios
categories.summary: Transmitters, receivers, radio links, gimbals, and pilot control upgrades.

categories.title: Antennas & Signal
categories.summary: Antennas, video links, range kits, signal boosters, and field comms.

categories.title: Field Tools
categories.summary: Portable setup, repair, soldering, measurement, and launch-day tools.

categories.title: Repair & Spares
categories.summary: Frames, motors, props, ESCs, screws, tapes, mounts, and crash recovery kits.

categories.title: Pilot Merch
categories.summary: DRONOVOD identity gear, patches, tags, stickers, and field-ready apparel.
